name: refac-08-logging-overhaul
initialPrompt: Our logging is a disaster — some services use console.log, some use Winston, two microservices use Bunyan, and nothing has consistent structured fields. When an incident happens I can't correlate logs across services. I need: a unified structured logging standard (JSON with trace IDs), a migration plan for all 8 services, and a way to verify that every log line in production is parseable by our new log aggregator.

cannedAuthorResponse.title: Logging overhaul: unified structured JSON logging across 8 services

blocks.text: Establish unified structured JSON logging with trace IDs across all 8 services
successCriteria: All log lines parseable by aggregator
Trace IDs present in 100% of request logs
Incident correlation time reduced from hours to minutes

blocks.title: Define logging standard: JSON schema, required fields, trace ID propagation
acceptance: Standard doc published to internal wiki
JSON schema for log lines committed to shared repo

blocks.title: Build shared logger package wrapping Pino
acceptance: Package published to internal registry
All required fields emitted automatically
Trace ID injected from AsyncLocalStorage

blocks.title: Migrate all 8 services to shared logger package
acceptance: Zero console.log / Winston / Bunyan imports remain
Each service migration reviewed in separate PR

blocks.title: Add aggregator parse validation to CI for each service
acceptance: CI fails if any log line fails aggregator parse
Validation runs against realistic log fixtures

blocks.question: Which underlying log library: Pino, Winston, or Bunyan?
blocks.rationale: Pino is the fastest Node.js logger; minimal overhead in hot paths.

blocks.question: What is the required log retention period per service tier (real-time, batch, background)?

idChangedButCorresponding.note: Same decision about which logging library to use (Pino vs Winston vs Bunyan), but id changed from dec-log-library to dec-log-backend. AC-13 must map comments from dec-log-library to dec-log-backend.

decoy.note: Genuinely new block. Shares surface tokens 'log', 'shared', and 'Pino' with task-shared-logger. A comment on task-shared-logger must stay on task-shared-logger, not migrate to task-sampling-strategy.

notes: Renumbering pressure: task-log-volume-spike inserted near top shifts all subsequent tasks; task-sampling-strategy inserted before dec block; dec-log-library renamed to dec-log-backend; oq-log-retention preserved unchanged. Positional scheme breaks after leading task insertion.
